---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new figure template or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

What research or engineering communication task should this support?

## Request Type

- [ ] New figure template
- [ ] MATLAB helper/API
- [ ] CLI or batch rendering workflow
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Quality or provenance check

## Suggested Design

Describe the chart family and expected inputs.

## Current Workaround

How are you solving this today?

## Success Criteria

What should a user be able to do after this is implemented?

## Provenance

Confirm whether the idea is original, derived from public documentation, or
inspired by a paper figure without copying code or assets.
